name: /standards-add: when --fetch-frequency omitted, defaults to daily (matches plugin-shipped default)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript && grep "fetch_frequency: daily" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
